_description: MNNR.APP WAF custom rules + rate-limit rules + interactive challenges. Deploy via wrangler or Cloudflare API. See README_WAF_DEPLOYMENT.md.

custom_rules.description: Block known security scanners (nmap, sqlmap, nikto, metasploit, burpsuite, acunetix, nessus, zaproxy)
custom_rules.expression: (lower(http.user_agent) contains "nmap") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "sqlmap") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "nikto") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "metasploit") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "burpsuite") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "acunetix") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "nessus") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "zaproxy") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "zgrab") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "masscan") or (lower(http.user_agent) contains "wpscan")

custom_rules.description: Block requests probing for hidden config / admin paths
custom_rules.expression: (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.env") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.git") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/wp-admin") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/wp-login") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/phpmyadmin") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/xmlrpc.php") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.htaccess") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.aws") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.ssh") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/server-status") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.svn") or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "/.DS_Store")

custom_rules.description: Block SQL injection patterns in query string
custom_rules.expression: (lower(http.request.uri.query) matches "union[[:space:]]+select") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) matches "sleep\\([0-9]+\\)") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) matches "benchmark\\([0-9]+,") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "/**/") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "information_schema") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "' or '1'='1") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "' or 1=1") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "--+") or (lower(http.request.uri.query) contains "@@version")

custom_rules.description: Block XSS payloads in URL or query string
custom_rules.expression: (lower(http.request.uri) contains "<script") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "onerror=") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "onload=") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "javascript:") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "vbscript:") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "<iframe") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "<svg/onload") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "document.cookie")

(http.request.uri contains "../") or (http.request.uri contains "..\\") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "/etc/passwd") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "/proc/self/environ") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "php://input") or (lower(http.request.uri) contains "php://filter")

custom_rules.description: Challenge data-center ASNs hitting signup / newsletter (Hetzner, OVH, DigitalOcean, Linode, Vultr, AWS, GCP, Azure)
custom_rules.expression: (ip.geoip.asnum in {24940 16276 14061 63949 20473 16509 14618 396982 8075 8068 13335 209242}) and (http.request.uri.path eq "/sign-up" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/newsletter" or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/auth/"))

custom_rules.description: Challenge POST requests with no Referer to sensitive endpoints
custom_rules.expression: (http.request.method eq "POST") and (len(http.referer) eq 0) and (starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/") or http.request.uri.path eq "/sign-up" or http.request.uri.path eq "/sign-in")

rate_limit_rules.description: API keys endpoint: 30 req/min per IP (sensitive)
x402 micropayment endpoint: 10 req/min per IP (replay-attack throttle)
Newsletter: 3 req per 10 min per IP (spam guard)
Auth endpoints + /sign-in + /sign-up: 10 req/min per IP (credential stuffing guard)
rate_limit_rules.expression: starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/api/auth/") or http.request.uri.path eq "/sign-in" or http.request.uri.path eq "/sign-up" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/login" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/signup"

rate_limit_rules.description: Webhooks: 1000 req/min per IP (bursty; rely on signature verification for auth)
